description: Extract fillable form-field metadata (field_id, type, page, rect, and checkbox/radio/choice options) from a PDF AcroForm to JSON. Wraps pypdf.
rules: read-only — opens the PDF, never writes it back
sorted by page then top-left position; fields whose location can't be resolved are dropped with a note
needs pypdf at runtime; absent -> empty {} output + exit 0
usage: Set PDF_PATH (input .pdf). Output: form_fields.json (a JSON array of field dicts).
limitation: Only finds fillable AcroForm fields; non-fillable forms yield an empty array (use extract-structure instead). Requires pypdf.
